finding: Two cleared personnel (T. Martin, R. Bennett) are overdue for annual security briefing and insider threat training.
corrective: Schedule group training session. T. Martin access suspended until completion.

requirement: NISPOM 32 CFR 117.19 — Removable media accountability and periodic inspection
finding: HQ-USB-002 assigned to R. Bennett has not been scanned in 115 days. Quarterly scan requirement exceeded.
corrective: Notify R. Bennett. Schedule scan at next SCIF visit.

finding: Zone 3 motion sensor offline since April 28, 2025. Alarm coverage gap exists during sensor replacement.
corrective: Manual guard posted during off-hours. Work order WO-2025-0412 submitted. NSA-approved replacement part on order.
notes: Mitigation accepted by ISSM. Verify repair completion by 2025-06-01.

finding: Three contractors overdue for annual security refresher.
corrective: Group training session conducted August 2024. All three contractors completed requirement.
